corrections.current: καὶ οὐ πάντα πᾶσιν ἐν τίστει εὐδοκιμεῖται.
corrections.correct: καὶ οὐ πάντα πᾶσιν ἐν πίστει εὐδοκιμεῖται.
corrections.note: Printed word is πίστει, not τίστει.
Transcript has correct text, but line number marker (25) printed in right margin after this line is omitted; marginal line numbers need not be in BODY. No body correction needed.
Apparatus line is broken at page end/start of note; transcript preserves break acceptably, no correction needed.

uncertain.note: The pronoun after παιδίσκης appears to read σαυτοῦ in the scan, but this is unusual; verify against adjacent pages/edition if needed.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct. One clear body error: πίστει misread as τίστει. Apparatus mostly correct except final word in line 16 note misread as παντες for παστει. Right-margin numbers are line indicators and should not be treated as body text.
